channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lots of litter on pavement, 5th April
item.description:
This stretch of Parish Lane has loads of litter (bottles, cardboard boxes etc) along the pavements. Could it get a clean-up please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cookham Road, 5th April
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cookham Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tipping dump., 5th April
item.description:
There is a large fly tipped dumped. It has gas canisters and old electronics and building materials. It also seems infested with rats and other pests.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrooke Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Infront of the Athelstan Gardens bin shed, 5th April
item.description:
We woke up this morning to many bags tiles and other bulding waste, plus a large box which clearly still has the persons address written on the block. The person lives several roads away from here. We want this person fined as this is an ongoing problem, with neighbouring roads and even further afield coming into our area to dump their waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Avenue, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load (Estates)

item.title: An abandoned car in public car parking, 5th April
item.description:
Car registration number is CK08AWM this car has not been moved from September 2025 and this full loaded with rubbish or old belongings which is higher fire risk hazard.Taking a residential parking space and putting other car in fire risk.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John Fisher Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rug and other furnishings dumped, 5th April
item.description:
Random househood rubbish dumped by the sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrooke Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped clothes rack, 5th April
item.description:
Metal clothes dryer dumped behind the big houses backing onto Hardings Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parish Lane, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins, 5th April
item.description:
The brown bins don’t belong to anyone and have been left on the street. The bins don’t belong to residents in Dukes Avenue; there is fly tipping around the bins. This has been reported numerous times but not resolved.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dukes Avenue, Stifford Clays, Grays
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green telephone cabinet broken off it's foundation, 5th April
item.description:
It looks like it's been hit by a car
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheridan Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 5th April
item.description:
This problem has already been reported but more rubbish has been dumped in the same area over the past week.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crowden Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The green light is not working, 5th April
item.description:
The traffic light near the kings arm is not working correctly, the green light is not showing up as it should done
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Arnsberg Way, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: An abandoned car in public car parking, 5th April
item.description:
This car is abandoned from January and it is fire risk and health and safety risk .Taking a parking space from house residents.Car registration number is Y7ABK
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St John Fisher Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove the graffiti from shutters, 5th April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on Green tile wall, 5th April
item.description:
Please clean off the orange graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bedroom furniture and bed frame, 5th April
item.description:
123 has dumped bedroom furniture and a bed frame and other rubbish on the pavement on 04/04/26. The pavement is partially blocked which has become dangerous to walk past.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123, Eden Park Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Graffiti tags on public facing wall - Queens Road, 5th April
item.description:
